channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles of Death Metal's 20th anniversary tour promises a high-energy performance from a band known for their engaging live shows.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's Konnakol Tour is generating buzz, showcasing his evolution as an artist and his strong fanbase.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is known for his powerful vocals and emotional performances, making his UGLY Tour a must-see.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's Mountain Tour is expected to be a visually stunning and musically diverse experience.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's Unraveled Tour is highly anticipated, following her meteoric rise in the music industry.

item.title: The Rush Tribute Project @ Palace of Fine Arts
item.description: 2026-10-17 02:30 — The Rush Tribute Project at Palace of Fine Arts. Childish Gambino's New World Tour is highly anticipated, promising a unique blend of genres and a dynamic live experience.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bleachers' Forever tour showcases their indie-pop sound, promising an engaging live performance.

item.title: Bonnie Raitt @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Bonnie Raitt at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. $uicideboy$'s Grey Day Tour features a mix of hip-hop and punk, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: Public Image Ltd @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-13 03:00 — Public Image Ltd at The Fillmore. Public Image Ltd's tour is a chance to see a pioneering band in post-punk, known for their influential sound.

item.title: My Morning Jacket @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-04 03:00 — My Morning Jacket at The Fillmore. My Morning Jacket's shows are known for their improvisational style and strong musicianship.

item.title: The Wallflowers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-19 03:00 — The Wallflowers at The Fillmore. The Wallflowers bring a nostalgic vibe with their classic hits, appealing to fans of 90s rock.

item.title: Jon Batiste @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-04 03:00 — Jon Batiste at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Dilated Peoples' performance is a chance to see influential figures in hip-hop, known for their lyrical prowess.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. Social Distortion's tour offers a blend of punk rock and storytelling that resonates with fans.

item.title: Slayyyter @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-10 03:00 — Slayyyter at Fox Theater - Oakland. Slayyyter's WOR$T GIRL IN THE WORLD TOUR is generating excitement in the pop scene with her bold style.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against's Ricochet tour promises a politically charged performance from a band known for their activism.

item.title: Chayanne @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-12 02:00 — Chayanne at Chase Center. Billy Strings' shows are celebrated for their virtuosic musicianship and engaging performances.

item.title: Jacob Collier @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Jacob Collier at The Castro Theatre. Jacob Collier's innovative approach to music and live performance makes his show a unique experience.

item.title: Weezer @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-10 02:00 — Weezer at Chase Center.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center.

item.title: Screeching Weasel @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Screeching Weasel at August Hall.
